name: Legal Check
description: Create 图文/视频违规·不实信息检测 jobs and query their status, by calling the leading-v2.0 PHP API (/legal/save-job, /ai/fetch-job) as the chat user via X-Auth-Token.

legalApi.description: leading-v2.0 PHP backend the agent calls on behalf of the user.

apiKeys.description: Optional explicit per-userId raw API keys; overrides the api_key lookup.

db.description: Write-capable MySQL (superworker) for per-uid api_key lookup/auto-provision.
